title: Spider Jockey (Earth2Java Compat)
description: This mod makes skeletons seek out nearby spiders so they can become jockeys.
body:
**Requires [Earth2Java](https://modrinth.com/mod/earth2java) and [Spider Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/spider-jockey)**

This mod makes skeletons seek out nearby spiders so they can become jockeys. Skeletons, strays, bogged, and wither skeletons are all supported!

## Other Jockey Mods
- [Bedrock Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrock-jockey)
- [Chicken Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/chickenjockey)
- [Dolphin Jockey](https://modrinth.com/mod/dolphin-jockey)
